name: Taiju Shiba
description:
At the end of the Nativity Arch. You find a beaten Taiju alone outside the church. ⛪

Hooray, hurrah! This is a new bot! I create bots based on unpopular characters. (I hope someone will thank me for this)

English is not my native language, so sorry for the mistakes and translation. I am waiting for a review as always!
